videos.headline: Highlight: Tory Blaylock outruns Temple in No. 13 Oklahoma beatdown
videos.description: Blaylock rushes for 100 yards on 14 attempts with two touchdowns while the Sooners' defense tacks on four sacks and an interception in the 42-3 blowout win over the Owls.

videos.headline: OU's John Mateer showers his teammates with praise after win
videos.description: Following the win over Temple, Mateer gives credit to the No. 13 Sooners' strong defense and true freshman RB Tory Blaylock then previews their approach to SEC play.
